items.caption: A bottle of "White King"-brand commercial bleach, resting atop my mother's Fisher & Paykel washing machine.

A pair of black rubber boots, a bottle of bleach, and a cleaning brush placed on a wooden deck. the boots are positioned to the left, with the bottle of bleach to the right and the cleaning brush in front of the boots. the background features a white building with a green door and a blue pot. the overall scene suggests a setting for cleaning or maintenance tasks.
